---
title: "Pricing"
description: "Transparent ZAR pricing for biostatistics consulting: protocol starter, full analysis and publication-polish packages, plus an hourly rate."
pagetitle: "Pricing — StudyStats Biostatistics Packages"
format: html
---

## Rates &amp; Packages

Every research project is different, so we offer **fixed-price packages** for common workflows and a transparent hourly rate for everything else. All prices are in South African Rand (ZAR) and exclude VAT.

### Discovery Call &mdash; *Free*

A 20&ndash;30 minute call to scope your project, sanity-check your research question, and outline next steps. No commitment.

[Book a free call](contact.html){.btn .btn-light .btn-sm}

### Fixed-Price Packages

| Package                | Best for                                | What's included                                                                                  | Price (from) |
|:-----------------------|:----------------------------------------|:-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------:|
| **Protocol Starter**   | MMed / MSc registrars at proposal stage | Aims &amp; objectives review, sample size calculation, statistical analysis plan                | R 3 500      |
| **Full Analysis**      | Thesis or first-author paper            | Data wrangling, analysis, publication-ready tables &amp; figures, written interpretation memo   | R 8 500      |
| **Publication Polish** | Pre-submission manuscripts              | Re-analysis, journal-formatted tables/figures, reviewer-response support                        | R 5 500      |
| **Research Retainer**  | Research units / NGOs                   | Block of consulting hours per month, priority turnaround                                        | R 5 000 / mo |

### Hourly Rate

For ad-hoc work or scope outside a package: **R 850 / hour**, billed in 30-minute increments.

### Indicative Time per Service

| Service                  | Estimated time |
|:-------------------------|:---------------|
| Protocol writing support | 1&ndash;2 hours |
| Sample size calculation  | 1&ndash;4 hours |
| Data wrangling           | 3&ndash;5 hours |
| Statistical analysis     | 3&ndash;5 hours |
| Publication-ready tables | 2&ndash;4 hours |
| Figure creation          | 1&ndash;3 hours |
| Results interpretation   | 1&ndash;3 hours |
| Discussion assistance    | 1&ndash;3 hours |

### How Billing Works

- A **50% deposit** secures your project start; balance on delivery.
- You can be billed **per stage** of the project (e.g. protocol &rarr; analysis &rarr; tables).
- Quotes are valid for 30 days.
- Turnaround is typically **1&ndash;2 weeks** for a preliminary deliverable, with iterative revisions thereafter.

[Request a quote](contact.html){.btn .btn-light .btn-lg}
